use-ai-generated-descriptions.label: Use AI generated descriptions
use-ai-generated-descriptions.info:
Enable AI-generated descriptions for saved pages. Turning this on will download a large AI model (takes approximately 5-15 minutes depending on your connection) and use a significant amount of storage.

For best results, first time, enable this feature on a stable, unmetered network (e.g., Wi-Fi).
use-ai-generated-descriptions.error: Downloading AI model was taking longer than expected and either stalled or stopped reporting. Try closing and reopening this extension first. Restarting your browser next. In both cases navigate to the settings again and see, if the download will resume or start again. If that is not going to help try uninstalling the AI model from chrome://on-device-internals/ and restarting the browser. After doing that, the download should be initiated again.
